name: Hyperfine, Inc.
business: Hyperfine, Inc. sells the Swoop Portable MR Imaging System, an AI-powered portable ultra-low-field MRI device for brain imaging. It targets healthcare professionals in hospitals (ICUs, emergency departments, clinics), neurology offices, and international markets. The company also generates revenue from service and support agreements.

exposures.sentence: Our Swoop system is a portable, ULF MRI device for producing images that display the internal structures of the head where full diagnostic examination is not clinically practical.

catalysts.event: FDA 510(k) clearance of ninth-generation AI-powered Swoop system software
catalysts.sentence: In July 2024, we received 510(k) clearance from FDA of the ninth-generation AI-powered Swoop system software.

catalysts.event: CE Mark approval for ninth-generation software
catalysts.sentence: In October 2024 and February 2025, we received CE Mark and UKCA Mark approval for the ninth-generation of software, respectively.

catalysts.event: UKCA Mark approval for ninth-generation software
catalysts.sentence: In October 2024 and February 2025, we received CE Mark and UKCA Mark approval for the ninth-generation of software, respectively.

catalysts.event: FDA 510(k) clearance of tenth-generation Optive AI software
catalysts.sentence: In May 2025, we received 510(k) clearance from the FDA for our tenth-generation AI-powered software, Optive AI software.

catalysts.event: CE Mark and UKCA Mark approvals for Optive AI software
catalysts.sentence: In August 2025, we received both CE Mark and UKCA Mark approvals for our Optive AI software.

catalysts.event: FDA clearance of eleventh-generation AI-powered software
catalysts.sentence: In December 2025, we received FDA clearance for the eleventh-generation AI-powered software.

catalysts.event: Regulatory approval in India from CDSCO
catalysts.sentence: In December 2025, we received regulatory approval in India from the Central Drugs Standard Control Organization (CDSCO), authorizing commercialization of the first-generation Swoop system throughout India.

catalysts.event: Entered into Loan and Security Agreement with Horizon Technology Finance Management LLC
catalysts.sentence: On March 18, 2026 (the Loan Closing Date), we entered into a Loan and Security Agreement (the Loan Agreement) with Horizon Technology Finance Management LLC (the Lender), providing for a senior secured term loan facility of up to $40.0 million, with $15.0 million funded on the Loan Closing Date.

tamClaims.claim: Total addressable market for Swoop system device placements in the United States is more than $16 billion.
tamClaims.sentence: We estimate in the United States alone that our total addressable market for Swoop system device placements is more than $16 billion.
